calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAYA SEELY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

Plaintiff Maya Seely's unopposed Motion Regarding Transfer of Venue from San Francisco County to Riverside County is GRANTED.

If an action is filed in the proper county, the court has discretion to transfer venue "[w]hen the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by the change." (Code of Civil Procedure section 397(c).)

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted and the case is transferred to Riverside County. The court note Defendants failed to oppose the motion, and it takes their non-opposition as consent to the granting of the motion. (See California Rules of Court, rule 8.54(c).)

Plaintiff shall pay all applicable transfer fees.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
